scripts.dev: concurrently -k -n BE,FE,DB -c blue,green,yellow "npm --prefix server run dev" "vite" "npm --prefix server run db:studio"
scripts.clean: node -e "const fs=require('fs'); ['dist', 'node_modules/.vite', 'server/dist', 'server/qrcode.png'].forEach(f => fs.rmSync(f, {recursive: true, force: true}))"
scripts.build: npm --prefix server run build && vite build
scripts.start: npm --prefix server run db:push -- --force && node server/dist/db/seed.js && node server/dist/db/cleanup.js && node server/dist/index.js
